message:
docs(catalog): refresh extension artifact provenance and master catalog

Regenerated extension documentation artifacts after recent conformance
and CRLF normalization fixes:

- docs/extension-artifact-provenance.json: updated provenance records
- docs/extension-master-catalog.json: refreshed catalog metadata
- docs/extension-sample.json: expanded sample data (+716 lines) with
  additional extension examples and metadata fields
- tests/ext_conformance/artifacts/PROVENANCE_VERIFICATION.json: updated
  verification records to reflect current artifact state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
